entry.title: As an individual learner, can I do use my GMAIl ID for learning hub subscription purchase?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am interested to do certification on SAP. However being an individual learner , I tried to purchase SAP learning Hub subscription but it failed. 

Could someone confirms the process if they know it?

entry.title: Certification Exam System Unavailable
entry.content:
Edit:

It took one full hour of wasted time, until I could book a new slot. The booked slot from 25.05.2026 was eventually closed, and my schedule for today got mixed up. 👎

--------------------------------------

Good morning,

I booked a slot to take a certification exam on 25.05.2026 at 10 CEST. Upon singning in on time, I receive the message that the system is "temporarily unavailable".

Suggestions from SAP are

  • Try refreshing this page to see if the system recovers. --> it is now 45 min. after the slot started, without any change
  • If it remains unavailable, this slot will be canceled automatically. --> but I am also not able to book a new slot, because the system is still stuck to my ongoing slot
  • You can also contact support (link) for further assistance. --> no answer from there which is not really helpful

I created a case upon this issue, but it is still untouched.

Any ideas for me from anyone?

Thanks in advance

BR

Martin

entry.title: "System temporarily unavailable" for the C_TS452_2601 certification
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Greetings!

I'm facing an issue while attempting the SAP certification exam C_TS452_2601. 

Initially, I scheduled the exam on 25th May at 4:30 PM IST. However, during the launch of the exam, the system displayed a "System temporarily unavailable" message continuously.

Even after refreshing for nearly an hour, the issue was not resolved. I then created a support case, but there was no response and eventually the exam slot got cancelled.

I rescheduled the exam again for today (26th May) at 10:30 AM IST, but unfortunately the exact same issue is happening again. I have been refreshing continuously for more than 20 mins, and the exam is still not launching. 

I also updated the existing support case with an additional comment mentioning that the issue persists.

Has anyone else faced a similar issue recently with SAP certification exams? if yes, how was it resolved? Any guidance or suggestions would be really helpful.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

VM

entry.title: "System temporarily unavailable" for certification C_CPI_2601
entry.content:
I was scheduled to take the exam 15 minutes ago, and as the title says this is not possible due to the system being unavailable. From looking at the forums, this apparently was also true earlier this week. 

Looking at the network traffic of this page, it appears the reason is "systemUnderMaintenance". Can we have a formal announcement from SAP for such maintenance events and blocking of the relevant slots so we can book at times when the system is actually available and/or have appropriate notification so we don't waste time waiting for a certification to start that just can't happen?

For this specific certification, when should I expect to rebook it?

entry.title: SAP PP & Manufacturing Certification Still not passed
entry.content:
Hello everybody 

I had used my attempt from my University to take the SAP PP & Manufacturing certification (C_TS422) with the new format exam System based, i had take it twice and still not passed. 

I do checked it like 6 times reviewing it, studying again from SAP Learning hub and i used the SAP GUI system, and i do re check using Claude and Gemini, but the result still below 50. Anyone have the same issue? or anyone have tips and trick for my future certification exam

Do you guys know how the SAP examination our system based exam?

Thank you

entry.title: PS certifications Public edition
entry.content:
Hello Gurus

Can you help me with the list of certification codes or resources for PS (Project System) on S4 HANA Public Cloud edition?

entry.title: SAP Certification Recommendations for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Professional Services Consultant
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently working as an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Consultant, primarily focusing on the Professional Services area, including project management, resource management, staffing, timesheets, customer projects, billing, revenue recognition, and related end-to-end business processes.

I am planning to pursue an SAP certification and would appreciate guidance from the community on the most suitable certification path.

Could you please advise on the following:

Which SAP certification is most relevant for consultants working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Professional Services?

Are there any certifications specifically focused on Professional Services or Project-Based Services in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Would it be better to pursue a broader certification such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant, or are there more specialized certifications available?

What learning resources, training courses, or learning journeys would you recommend for preparation?

For those already certified, how valuable has the certification been in terms of project opportunities and career growth?

Any recommendations, certification paths, or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

entry.title: "System temporarily unavailable" - System-based certification (C_CPE_2601)
entry.content:
Hello, there is a reoccurring problem when trying to access the system-based certification.

I had a first attempt at the certification C_CPE_2601 which I failed and now I wanted to use my second attempt. In doing so, I tried three times and each time the exam environment isn't available. This error persists from the start of the exam time slot for like 30-60mins until I can reschedule. This I have done twice on 11th June and now (12th June) on my third try I still get this error:

 

Please fix this.

UPDATE:
On 13th June, for a couple of hours, I also wasn't able to reschedule the exam even though I had 2 attempts from my subscription and 3 of the 4 exam attempts left. Later this day it worked again but the systems for the exam are still unavailable.

entry.title: Zertifizierung zur FI-Beraterin für die Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

Die Module S4F10, S4F12, S4F13, S4F15 und S4F17 habe ich bereits absolviert. Derzeit bin ich als S/4HANA Key Userin im Bereich Finance tätig, aktuell auf der S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

Mich interessiert die Zertifizierung zur FI-Beraterin für die Cloud Edition. Handelt es sich dabei um die Zertifizierung C_TS4FI?

Wenn ich es richtig verstanden habe, wäre dafür ein Abonnement des SAP Learning Hub empfehlenswert. 

Folgende Informationen habe ich auf der SAP-Internetseite gefunden:

„ Welche Kosten entstehen für den Erwerb und die Sicherstellung der Zertifizierung?

Um Ihre SAP-Zertifizierung zu erhalten und aufrechtzuerhalten:  Mit einem Abonnement des SAP Learning Hub erhalten Sie Zugang zu Live-Schulungen mit Experten, On-Demand-Übungssystemen, erweiterten Analysen, vier Prüfungsversuchen und kurzen, unbeaufsichtigten Assessments. Diese exklusive Lösung bietet Ihnen alles, was Sie zur Vorbereitung, zum Bestehen und zur Sicherstellung Ihrer SAP-Zertifizierungen benötigen – mit nur einem Abonnement. Die nächsten Abonnementkosten betragen pro Nutzer. Erhältlich direkt im SAP Store oder über Ihren SAP-Ansprechpartner. SAP PartnerEdge-Mitglieder erfahren mehr über den SAP Learning Hub (Partner Edition) und können ihn abonnieren . "        

Verstehe ich es richtig, dass man für 1.488,00 USD Zugang zum Learning Hub sowie vier Prüfungsversuche für die Zertifizierung erhält?

Vielen Dank für Ihre Unterstützung.

Liebe Grüße

Laura

entry.title: Price unavailable for SAP Certification Exam ಠ_ಠ
entry.content:
Hello,

I am planning to purchase the "SAP Certification exam, two attempts" subscription as an individual. Interestingly, I checked the SAP Store page last week and it was available for purchase perfectly fine, but starting from this week, it suddenly changed to "Price is currently not available".

Has anyone else encountered this same sudden issue recently?

If you faced this before, is it just a temporary system glitch, a regional restriction, or is there a specific workaround that worked for you?

Would love to hear any advice or experiences from fellow community members. Thanks!

entry.title: can someone please share the exam code for Treasury certification.
entry.content: can someone please share the exam code for Treasury certification.

entry.title: [SAP Certification] [System Based Assessment] - System exam downtime
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm actually writing this post while waiting for the exam system loading 🤣 

I booked a slot for C_DBADM_2601, from June 21st to June 22nd, I failed to take the exam due to System temporarily unavailable, I rescheduled it for 4 times, and the issue still remained.

Then today is the fifth time, I was lucky to access the exam, but it took me almost one hour to get into BTP cockpit, and then when I tried to do assessment, all the process took too long, even hit a button took like 30m to response.

Sure thing it doesn't relate to my network, the exam was taken in region eu10, and my work on SAP BAS is in eu10 too, they are in downtime these days; while other region (like us10 - I tested with trial account) doesn't

I created a case 2 days ago, I kept updating issues until now, but seems no one cares to reply about this issue

Case ID: 5000371611

entry.title: How Can I Practice Before Taking the SAP Certified Associate – Security Administrator Exam?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am planning to take the SAP Certified Associate – Security Administrator certification.

Url: SAP Certified - Security Administrator

Before registering for the official exam, I would like to take one or more practice exams to assess my current knowledge and identify areas that need improvement.

I have a few questions:

  1. Are there any official SAP practice exams or mock exams available for this certification?
  2. Does SAP provide any sample questions or exam simulations?
  3. Are there any recommended practice test platforms or question banks that closely resemble the real exam?
  4. Besides SAP Learning, are there any resources (books, courses, GitHub repositories, or community materials) that you would recommend for exam preparation?

I am looking for resources that are as close as possible to the actual exam format and difficulty.

Thank you,

QuocDT5

Any advice or recommendations from those who have already passed this certification would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: URGENT – C_THR81_2605 SyBA scores 15% both attempts, subscription expires June 30
entry.content:
Hi,

I am experiencing the same widespread grading issue affecting SAP system-based assessments.

Exam: C_THR81_2605
User: P2004055730
Case ID: 8d522c8b-0867-4757-bce1-24fa67c7f33b

Both my attempts scored 15% despite completing 9/10 tasks visually. Support case submitted but no response received.

Critical: My subscription expires June 30, 2026 — tomorrow. I have 4 remaining attempts and a multi-certification THR plan that is fully blocked by this unresolved issue.

@Margit_Wagner Please can you escalate urgently?

entry.title: HTTP 500 when redeeming subscription code + phone verification unavailable
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to redeem a subscription code on https://training.sap.com/redeem, but every time I submit the code, I receive the following error:

HTTP ERROR 500
This page isn’t working. training.sap.com is currently unable to handle this request.

I've already tried:

  • Different browsers

  • Incognito/private mode

  • Different devices

  • Different networks

The error persists.

Additionally, I've been unable to verify my mobile phone number for about two months. Whenever I try, I receive:

"Mobile number verification is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later."

This second issue hasn't prevented me from using my account so far, but I'm wondering whether it could somehow be related to the HTTP 500 error when redeeming the subscription.

Has anyone experienced either of these issues or found a solution?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: what is this C-TSCM62-65 certificate is available or not? what is the validity period?
entry.content: I passed this exam in 2012 , is this still valid or how to renew it?

entry.title: C_TADM_23 (SAP Certified Associate – SAP S/4HANA System Administration) no more available?
entry.content:
C_TADM_23 (SAP Certified Associate – SAP S/4HANA System Administration) no more available?

 

What is the alternative exam code?

entry.title: Valid certifications for PE Sell
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I have an inquiry regarding SAP certifications requirements for PE Sell.

I certified in Positioning SAP Business Suite for CEE while applying to PE Sell, in order to be authorized to sell SAP Cloud ERP. Now, the certification has changed its name to Positioning SAP Autonomous Enterprise for CEE, and its Learning Journey has also changed, including some new courses I did not take when I first certified. Note that we have not signed our PE Sell contract yet. 

Does that mean I need to take those new courses to re-validate my certification? Or my "old" certification with its "old" Learning Journey is still valid to sell Cloud ERP?

entry.title: SAP EXAM - TRAINING AND CERTIFICATION
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m new to the SAP ecosystem and I’m currently transitioning from the publishing world into SAP S/4HANA Finance.

Last Thursday I purchased my certification exam through the SAP Store. I received the initial email saying that my order was being processed, but I never received the confirmation that the order was completed.

I contacted the SAP Store the next day and they told me this was due to technical issues on their side. Earlier this week I followed up again, and they replied that they are still working on it, but without giving any indication of when it might be resolved.

As someone who is new to SAP, I find this situation a bit surprising coming from a global technology leader, and I’m not sure what the usual procedure is in cases like this.

Has anyone experienced something similar? Is there a specific support channel for technical issues related to certification exam access or order completion?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Scenario-Based Assessment-P_BTPA_2511 — SAP Certified - Solution Architect - SAP BTP
entry.content:
Certification: P_BTPA_2511 — SAP Certified - Solution Architect - SAP BTP
Date of Attempt: July 8, 2026
I completed the full scenario-based roleplay assessment within the allotted time, answering all interviewer questions clearly and completely. However, following submission, the system failed to generate results and feedback due to a network/upload interruption on SAP's platform side, and the exam was ultimately marked as failed after the countdown timer expired — despite the assessment content itself being fully completed.

Roleplay completed normally — The AI interviewer ("Brian Marshall") ended the roleplay session naturally after I had responded to all scenario questions

  • Submitted for analysis — I selected "Save & View Analysis" with approximately 13 minutes 50 seconds remaining on the exam timer.
  • Upload interruption occurred — Immediately after submission, the platform displayed: "Your upload was interrupted by a network issue and is restarting. Please don't close this page." The upload progress bar showed 69%, then appeared to reset and re-attempt (later screenshot shows 27%), indicating the upload restarted from a lower point rather than resuming.
  • Results and feedback failed to load — The right-hand panel remained on "Loading your results & feedback" with the message "Processing could take longer than expected — We experienced a brief connection interruption during your session. Your results will still appear – it may just take a bit longer."
  • imer expired during processing — The exam countdown continued running throughout the upload/processing delay. By the time the timer reached 0:00:30, the upload was still stuck (27%) and no results had been generated.
  • Exam marked as failed — Despite full completion of the spoken assessment, the session was ultimately marked as failed, apparently due to the platform being unable to complete processing before the timer expired — not due to the quality or completeness of my responses.
